title: OSTERIA FRANCESCANA - Massimo Bottura
description: “Osteria Francescana is a laboratory of ideas.It is also an observatory where we look at the past in a critical way, not a nostalgic one. Tradition in Evolution means looking at our culinary traditions from 10 kilometers away, to bring the best of the past into the future.”
